language_stack.primary_evidence: 1124 .rs files; codex-rs/* + crates/* (thegent-*, harness-*, arch_test, adrs, api)
language_stack.mirror_of: HeliosCLI (per AGENTS.md / HELIOSCLI_README.md; codex-rs/ + codex-cli/ subtree matches openai/codex layout)

CI.detail: .github/workflows/ 50+ workflows (bazel, ci, codeql, cargo-deny/audit, snyk, sonarcloud, codeql-rust, dast)

dup_exposure.rationale: HeliosCLI/helioscope carries locally-forked re-implementations of capabilities that already exist in the phenotype-* / pheno* library family. These are candidates for upstream consumption rather than local duplication.

consumable.replaces: thegent-* eventing + thegent-router / thegent-runtime local pub-sub + custom request_id propagation
ad-hoc cargo-deny/audit + manual dep pinning in Cargo.toml / Cargo.lock / pnpm-lock.yaml
scattered `request_id` / `run_id` string threading in thegent-* and harness_* crates
vp-icons.css (empty stub) + assets/icons/* in 367-dir assets/ tree
scripts/* + Taskfile.yml + justfile + process-compose.yaml + Make-equivalents (Taskfile, justfile, ruff, mypy, codespell overlap)

sota_gaps.rationale: Compared to a state-of-the-art CLI agent harness in 2026 (codex, claude-code, gemini-cli, aider, goose), the following capabilities are absent or only stubbed in this HeliosCLI mirror.

gaps.feature: MCP server lifecycle hardening (stdio child reaping, OAuth refresh, streamable-HTTP transport)
gaps.evidence: MCP type usage present (mcp_types), but no centralized mcp-server manager in codex-rs/mcp-client* surface; only prototype in codex-rs/rmcp-client

gaps.feature: Sandboxed tool execution (seatbelt / bubblewrap / landlock profiles per-platform)
gaps.evidence: codex-rs/linux-sandbox + codex-rs/process-hardening exist but no declared SBPL profile checked in; macOS seatbelt policy absent

gaps.feature: Multi-modal input (image, PDF, audio attachments) end-to-end
gaps.evidence: codex-rs/protocol mentions images; no renderer-side attachment pipeline in codex-cli/TS
Not present; only TUI + CLI surfaces

gaps.feature: Local-model provider (ollama / llama.cpp / MLX) first-class support
gaps.evidence: phenotype-omlx exists in fleet but no OMLX/MLX provider wired into codex-rs/model_providers

gaps.feature: Plugin / extension marketplace (declarative plugin manifests, signed bundles)
gaps.evidence: extensions/ + plugins/ dirs exist but no manifest schema or signature verification

gaps.feature: Structured output / JSON-schema strict tool calling with auto-retry on schema mismatch
gaps.evidence: tool_call types in protocol, no centralized schema-validation retry loop surfaced

gaps.feature: Telemetry / OTEL spans exported via phenotype-bus
gaps.evidence: thegent-metrics + helios.db (sqlite) present; no OTEL exporter wired to phenotype-bus

gaps.feature: Headless non-interactive exec mode (--quiet --json) for CI/automation parity with codex exec
gaps.evidence: codex-rs/exec exists but JSON output schema is undocumented / unstable

gaps.feature: Cross-platform single binary release (cargo dist / nix flake app) — flake.nix exists but no app outputs
gaps.evidence: flake.nix present; no `apps.*` or `packages.*` outputs declared

convergence_cluster.label: multi-stack
convergence_cluster.rationale: Single repo spans 5+ language stacks (Rust codex-rs, TypeScript codex-cli, Python harness/, Go go/harness, JS/HTML assets) under Bazel + Cargo + pnpm + uv. Too heterogeneous for 'web-stack'; not actively live-deployable (no 'live'); functions as a multi-stack mirror of HeliosCLI/codex rather than a converged single-product monorepo. Best fit: multi-stack.

action_items.task: Pin and adopt phenotype-dep-guard + phenotype-request-id across codex-rs and thegent-* crates to drop local reimplementations
Wire MLX / OMLX local model provider into codex-rs/model_providers so helioscope exposes phenotype-omlx end-to-end
Adopt phenotype-bus in thegent-router + thegent-runtime; remove inline pub-sub from thegent-runtime and route telemetry + audit events through the shared bus
Stabilize `codex exec --json` output schema and document it; align with heliosBench/perf-results harness for CI parity
Add Nix `apps.*` + `packages.*` outputs to flake.nix; publish single-binary cross-platform builds via cargo-dist
